description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker predominantly black with a white Nike Swoosh logo on both sides and a white midsole and outsole. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with black laces and a padded collar for comfort. The heel area displays the NIKE brand name in bold white letters on a black background. The upper material appears to be a combination of synthetic leather and textile, showing visible creases and signs of wear. The outsole is flat and likely made of rubber, designed for urban walking or casual sports. The overall silhouette is streamlined, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A black and white Nike sneaker with a lace-up design, visible branding, and signs of wear, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the NIKE logo in white on the black heel tab and the rounded heel shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large white Swoosh logo and the overall profile of the shoe.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the toe box, lacing system, and the slightly worn appearance of the upper.
description_view_3: Right side view with another white Swoosh logo and the shoe's low-top silhouette.
attribute_logo: White NIKE text on heel tab, white Swoosh on both sides
